name: Shrimp and Penne Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Shrimp, grilled, peeled and deveined
1 lb Ripe plum tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook penne in rapidly boiling, salted water as directed on the package until al dente.
2. Remove from heat and drain well.
3. Place penne in a bowl and stir in oil. Coat well.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients.
5. Allow to sit for 15 minutes.
6. Serve immediately.
